mapper.select: SELECT checkpoint_id AS checkpointId, (OCTET_LENGTH(checkpoint_input) + OCTET_LENGTH(checkpoint_output)) AS size FROM voj_problem_checkpoints WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY checkpoint_id
SELECT checkpoint_exactly_match FROM voj_problem_checkpoints WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY checkpoint_id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_problem_checkpoints (problem_id, checkpoint_id, checkpoint_exactly_match, checkpoint_score, checkpoint_input, checkpoint_output) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{checkpointId}, #{isExactlyMatch}, #{score}, #{input}, #{output})
